title: EQ Skills Report Templates

self_awareness.high: You may notice internal emotional shifts early, which helps decision-making.
self_awareness.moderate: You may notice emotions after they start affecting behavior.
self_awareness.low: You may benefit from naming emotions and triggers more explicitly.

self_regulation.high: You may pause and respond thoughtfully even under stress.
self_regulation.moderate: You may regulate well in some settings but struggle in others.
self_regulation.low: You may benefit from pause routines, scripts, and recovery habits.

empathy.high: You may read emotional signals well and respond supportively.
empathy.moderate: You may notice some cues clearly but miss others.
empathy.low: You may benefit from practicing perspective-taking questions.

social_awareness.high: You may pick up group mood and context effectively.
social_awareness.moderate: You may read social situations fairly well with enough time.
social_awareness.low: You may benefit from noticing tone, timing, and context more deliberately.

relationship_management.high: You may handle conflict and communication in a constructive way.
relationship_management.moderate: You may manage many situations well but struggle under pressure.
relationship_management.low: You may benefit from conflict scripts, listening routines, and repair habits.

global_coaching_rules: Return 2 strongest EQ domains and 2 suggested growth areas.
Link suggestions to school, work, family, and teamwork contexts.
